title: Test draft version before push it to live
excerpt:
Hi all,

posts.author: f2yez (Fayez Bdair)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I want to ask about draft version, I have made some changes inside my board view code, and I created new version then I deployed the board view to it, How I can test the changes before pushing the version to live any other way than preview inside board setup ?

Thanks!

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @f2yez

That’s a great question! Similar to Integration apps, when you add a draft version to your Board View or Dashboard Widget apps, you should be able to see the new draft version as an option:

image1550×612 51.3 KB

The non-live version will include the version digits, while the Live will simply show the feature name. Does that make sense?

I hope this helps you find the perfect testing environment for your apps!

-Alex

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
